snippet.title: Talja (Official Video) Jassa Dhillon | Deepak Dhillon | Gur Sidhu | New Punjabi Song 2021| Above All
snippet.description:
Brown Town Music Presents Official Video of Latest Punjabi Song of 2021 Talja By Jassa Dhillon Ft Deepak Dhillon From His Debut Album Above All.



Track Credits:
Track Name: Talja
Artist : Jassa Dhillon Ft Deepak Dhillon
Music : Gur Sidhu
Mixing & Mastering: B Saanj
Lyrics: Jassa Dhillon
Female Lead: Navi Brar
Edit & Colour Grading: Gobindpuriya
DOP: Renato Villas
Story/Screenplay: Garry Bhullar Films
Assitant Director: Paramvir
Make Up Artist: Parteek Dhillon
Bike Stunts: MSL Productions
BTS: Gundeep
Directed By: Japjeet Dhillon
Supporting Artists: Param Sandhu, Nirvair Sandhu & Lovely
Instagram Reels: Boss Music Productions
Special Thanks: Big Media
Hair Stylist: Varinder 8261
Lyrical Video:  Roop Kamal Singh
Producer: Nav Sandhu
Label: Brown Town Music
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Srikant Seshadri





Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment
Instagram: https://instagram.com/btownmediaa​​​​​​



Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic​​​




Talja Lyrics:

Oh baby bass rehando na lado,
mere husan de dushmna naal ,
Ehh jmaana jaalim ha,
te jaalim he rehna aa,
Oye aah kachjiya ambiya ta ma chabb k khaju , 
dekhi chall banda ki alet lene saare mai,
bicho paad du mere saale de,
 
 
Forda de toachan vargi yaari , 
ho peju pind  tere te bhari,
o vigdya jatt te jhota same
Kardu raga cho garmi saari ,
naal jo mere ohh bande agg , 
ptandar lott layinde ne thagg ,
roj da yabb  tu giriya chabb ho,
Dekh njaare ni ,
 
 
la sharta yara tera thoke te bade swaare ni , 
je kahe bna dya scene ma hune dabaare ni,
 
 
O talja o talja o talja talja talja
Talja talja ve badmasha, 
awe hoju koi tamasha ,
ve kato jaan dukhan vich pauni ,
Ve Koi la k rakh du passa ,
katt la rabb toh thoda dar k ,
thode ghot sabar de bharke,
sare pind di akh vich radke  , 
ve fadya jayega , 
awe velly banda banda ragya jayega ,
awe velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
Aah hukam de ike dukke  ni,
tere jatt de muhre fikke ni ,
on flasha hon kude,
rahinde saah vairi de khiche ni  ,
mast aa rahindi  chaal ,
lafdya nal kadiye laal ,
kai takkre  velly  mittra nu, 
sada vinga v na vaal , 
baba naal te khidya maal , 
te aun  hulaare ni ,
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade swaare ni ,
j kahe bna dya scene ma hune dbaare ni,
 
Begaane putt hoye aa juttt , 
ve raat pawayega,
Aah patlo da dil kehnda,
tu att krayega ,
Shant shaant  k pauna,
ve jatta kurte kaale ,
chaklo chaklo kahinde,
jo pattu rakhda naale , 
tu ik te vairi bahle
Mud pachtayega ,
ve tu velly banda banda ragdya jayega
 
 
 
 
Pura tohra dhakad shora ,
ni zigre  bamb kude,
Aah rees jatt di laude,
ni jaane hamb kude
Tohna chakde roj he,
gode thale laa dya ge
Tu bol pyaar de bol  , 
hune puga dya ge
 
 
Toba toba , 
teriya galla ve,
toba toba tere karaar ,
na ishq tere vich bhora , 
ve sare auto e ne hathiyaar, 
din ne chaar te lammi car , 
sirre kuj laayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade sware ni.

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 2 | Teacher Sahi Hona Chahiye
snippet.description:
Episode 3 goes live as soon as we reach 8.5M Subscribers

Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

Having a good teacher is extremely important while preparing for UPSC. Abhilash knows it, but he thinks his teacher is not good enough and wants to leave his current coaching center and find a better one. But his current institute doesn’t have a fee-return policy. What will Abhilash do now? Will he continue with his current coaching center or will he find a better teacher?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here’s to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!

Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare & Shiv Chauhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao (Acoustry Private Limited)
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #71: In a village named Bharatpur, Radha, who was married to Heera Thakur, completed her IAS studies after becoming a mother. She left her village to prepare for UPSC, successfully passed the exam, and ended up becoming the collector of her own district. Radha’s father-in-law Thakur Bhanu Pratap, who previously disowned her and his son Heera because they got married against his will, was so impressed by her achievement that he accepted them.
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC

snippet.title: Fast & Furious 9 – Official Hindi Trailer 2 (Universal Pictures) HD
snippet.description:
In cinemas soon!

Follow us on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/ 
Find us on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/
Follow us on Twitter at https://twitter.com/UniversalIND 


Genre: Action Thriller Cast: Vin Diesel, Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris “Ludacris” Bridges, John Cena, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel, with Helen Mirren and Charlize Theron Director: Justin Lin Written by: Dan Casey Based on Characters Created by: Gary Scott Thompson Producers: Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend, Samantha Vincent

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past.

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.

Vin Diesel’s Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he’s going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they’ve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom’s forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad).

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe—from London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris “Ludacris” Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar® winner Helen Mirren and Oscar® winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom’s past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.

snippet.title: A AA Hindi Dubbed Movie Part 3 | Nithiin, Samantha, Anupama Parameshwaran | Trivikram
snippet.description:
Welcome to Aditya Movies

Follow and Enjoy the Latest Hindi Dubbed Movie " A AA " Part 3 Starring Nithiin, Samantha and Anupama Parameshwaran. Directed by Trivikram.

#AAa #Nithiin #Samantha #AnupamaParameshwaran #AAAPart3 #AdityaMovies

Film Name: A AA
Director: Trivikram
Producer: Umesh Gupta
Actor: Nithiin
Actress: Samantha, Anupama Parameshwaran
Banner: Aditya Music India Pvt.Ltd.

A Aa Movie Synopsis:

Anasuya (Samantha) is a docile young woman who wants to break free from the clutches of her control-freak mom (Nadiya). While her mom is gone on a business trip, Anasuya sneaks up to the village of her maternal uncle. Vihari (Nithin) is Anasuya’s brother-in-law and he hosts her. Vihari’s wedding is already fixed with another girl. Anasuya’s mom gets her a wedding alliance. Rest of the story is all about the issue between these two families and how Anansuya Ramalingam and Anand Vihari unite at the end.

snippet.title: Popatlal हुआ Pooja के बातो से शौक -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता-Ep3146 -16thApril,2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/dplnk?schema=sony://asset/1000115096#utm_source=YOUTUBE&utm_medium=slate&utm_campaign=YT_traffic

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Episode 3146 : Is Popatlal's Wedding Fixed?
---------------------------------------------------------
Pooja finally arrives at the Gokuldham Society and Popatlal has arranged a lavish welcome for her. Upon arrival, Popatlal introduces Pooja to everyone and everyone to Pooja. He then takes Pooja to his house and introduces her to the ladies of Gokuldham society Watch the full episode now.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Wow Life Presents Achuma's Kitchen Tour ft. Archana & Zaara #WowLife
snippet.description:
The kitchen is the heart of the home! 

When we built and designed this home, our first thought was the kitchen!
Here’s presenting Achuma’s Kitchen and the organising of this whole space!

In a small bite, this kitchen is the happiness-spreading epicentre of the home!

Come along and tour Achuma’s kitchen with Zaara and Archana :-)

snippet.title: Ronna Hi Si | Ranjit Bawa | Pendu Boyz | D Harp | Latest Punjabi Songs 2021 | New Songs 2021
snippet.description:
Ek kahani jaha ek haseena thi aur ek deewana tha, Dono ke pyaar ki kahani me aayi darar par unke pyaar ki dor kaise unhe ek sath thame rkhti h.
Let's watch and find it out.
Starring Ranjit Bawa with beautiful Ginni Kapoor, Music by Pendu Boyz and Directed by Dilsher Singh and Khushpal Singh.

Main sochda aa k mar jawa 
Kuj kar jawa par marna nai main “ 
Mere dil vich teria yaadaan nu khfa karna nai main “ 
Tenu farq rta nai paina 
mera kakh v nai hun rehna 
Meri chaldi jindgi ne 
O aakhar saona c 
Main rona e c ‘ eh hona c dukh mere pallhe tu paona c 

Akhaan cho hanju sukk gye 
Jive saagra vichle paaani 
Hun jehar lagdia thaawan mainu 
Jithe jindgi maani 
Main tere pishe umar gawali
Tenu vakh hon di kaahli 
Mere pyar de jakhmaan te loon tu laona e c 
Main rona c “ “”””””””””

Harp Harp jithe ishq hunda 
Othe na kadraan payiaa 
Mainu tang kardiaa gallha oh 
Jo jaan lagge ne kahiaa
Dil tuttea tuttea tuttea 
Haye sb kuj mera luttea 
Main seh lya oh ilzaam 
Mere sir aona e c 
Main rona c “””””””””””

Mainu pta c reha nai jana 
Taithon alwida keha nai jana 
Laaparwahi Beparwahi 
Ban de aaye ishq tabaahi 
Eh milne di taang 
Khaadiaan oh soha di c
Chal jo v c 
Galti doha di c

snippet.title: Gun Warga - Harvy Sandhu (Official Video) | Gurlez Akhtar | Desi Crew | Latest Punjabi Songs 2021
snippet.description:
Latest Punjabi Songs 2021 - Gun Warga
Listen to on all audio streaming platforms: https://harvysandhu.bfan.link/gun-warga.yde

The quintessential Punjabi machismo shines in Harvy Sandhu's latest track  'Gun Warga'. Featuring music by the famous Desi Crew and featuring vocals by the amazing Gurlez Akhtar, the track will surely make you jump with energy. 

Track credits:
Song: Gun Warga
Singer: Harvy Sandhu
Music: Desi Crew
Lyrics: Jeet Kamal Kuhliwala
Video: Tru Team
Mix & Master: Sameer Charegoankar
Female Lead: Isha Sharma
Dop: Shoeb Siddiqui
Edit & DI: Garry Khatrao Media
Publicity Design: Roop Kamal Singh
Photography: Harnam Singh
Special Thanks: Sanjeev Sharma
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Akshay Kapoor

Reels Promotion - Blue Apple Digital
Online Promotions - GK Digital

Follow me on:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnFacebook
Instagram: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnInstagram
Twitter: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnTwitter
Snapchat: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnSnapchat

Don't forget to subscribe to my YouTube Channel:
https://bit.ly/HarvyOnYouTube

For Licensing enquiries: 
Email: sync-india@believedigital.com

#HarvySandhu #GurlezAkhtar #GunWarga

For Licensing enquiries: 
Email:- sync-india@believedigital.com

For booking enquiries:
artistbooking-india@believedigital.com


Lyrics :- 
Jione mod jiha rakhda si roab jo
vairiyan de mna vich ni
jet sky kehnda taarni aa hun kude
pyar wali jhana vich ni
heera raani de taaj vich jadya 
ni kehnda tere tann warga
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

peen jatti diya sonha utte chobar 
ve gla vicho zaan sukkiyan 
suit hunde ne import ve lahore ton
te saudi walon aun juttiyan
jinne listan ch aunde ne greek god
lainde ne dream saak de
fail jatti de husan agge sohniya 
iran diyan hooran aakhde

teri gallan diyan gallan rahe karda
jado khull jande datt ni
jehra khara vi na paave laal pari ch
oh laaliyan ne liya patt ni
kehnda nattiyan pva lu oh ch tere layi
si baapu jehra kann fadd da....
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

kala mole ve jatti di gori gall te
nazran ton raakhi karda
kaale rang da paranda bacha naag da
ve zehar wangu jaave charhda
jeet kuhliwale utte ho gaye parche
nitt hunde ne khadaak ve.....
fail jatti de husan agge sohniya 
iran diyan hooran aakhde

saah lain vi ni dinda ea bullet nu 
ni gedi utte gedi rakhda
kitte chakkya na jaave putt jatt da
ni billo tera time chakkda
teri takkni kaleja billo thaar ta
jo tappda si sun warga,
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

snippet.title: Mi 11 Ultra Unboxing : THIS IS REAL NUMBER KING!
snippet.description:
Mi 11 Ultra Unboxing : THIS IS REAL NUMBER KING!

Hey #TechBarArmy​​
This is Mi 11 Ultra & Xiaomi 80W wireless charger Unboxing in Hindi. In this Mi 11 Ultra Unboxing you will find ,Mi 11 Ultra design explained, Mi 11 Ultra battery, Mi 11 Ultra specifications, and my first impressions..

Mi 11 Ultra Specification
6.81-inch Quad HD+ AMOLED display with 120Hz refresh rate, 1700 nits (peak)brightness,Dolby Vision, Corning Gorilla Glass Victus protection
1.1-inch (126 x 294) AMOLED rear touch always-on display 
Snapdragon 888 5G
8GB LPPDDR5 with 128GB UFS 3.1 storage
50MP rear camera with 1/ 1.12″ Samsung ISOCELL GN2 sensor,48MP 128° ultra-wide Sony IMX586 sensor, 48MP telephoto camera with Sony IMX586 sensor
20MP front camera
In-screen fingerprint sensor
Dual speakers, SOUND BY Harman Kardon
IP68
5000mAh with 67W wired QC4+ / QC3+ / PD3.0, 67W wireless fast charging,
10w wireless reverse charging

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: King - Casanova ft. Rahul Sathu | The Gorilla Bounce | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
‼️AVAILABLE ON ALL AUDIO PLATFORMS‼️

✅♥️Follow🤴🏽On Instagram♥️✅
https://www.instagram.com/ifeelking

Song - ♥️ CASANOVA ♥️
Artist - King 🤴🏽 
Featuring Artist - Rahul Sathu 💯
Lyrics - King 🤴🏽 
Composer - King 🤴🏽 
Music Produced By - Rahul Sathu 🎸/
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/rahulsathuofficial
YouTube - https://youtube.com/c/RahulSathuOfficial
Mix And Mastering By - Rahul Sathu 🎚
Video Directed By - Yash Chhabra 🎥
Model/Actor - Kiley , Ashley & Paula Kalini 🌹
Sample- Legally Bought from Splice.com 🎯🖕🏽
King’s Costume Designed By - Drutika Singh 🎩
VFX & Color Grading By - Dilpreetvfx (Australia) 🧞‍♂️
Special Thanks To - Rupan Bal💎

This album is in association with KingsclanMGMT💎🧮
Digitally marketed By Kingsclan Marketing.
Produced By - King
Co-Produced By - KingsClanMgmt
King’s Costume Designed By - Drutika Singh
Thanks To - Sangeet Vilas 
VFX & Color Grading By - Dilpreetvfx (Australia)
Digitally Handled By Shahu Shinde 

CASANOVA LYRICS ❤️🎯

Kabhi fir na milein,
Na aap shikwa karein.
Zamana bole casanova
Ab jana hum kya karein?

I never break a heart ye cheezein mujhpe nahi jachti.
Oo baby i never play that part, tu kya hi nikaalegi galti.

main tere saamne fir tere peeche kyun ilzaamon ki kashti,
main kyun hi churaaunga jeetne mein jab der nahi lagti.

kehti dil ye mera tha seene mein jab raat
ko soyi thi,
shayad tu hai vo jiski vajah se baad me royi thi.

Pata hi na chala tujhse pyaar ho gaya!
darwaza dekhti rahi intezaar ho gaya!

(Hook)

Kabhi fir na milein,
Na aap shikwa karein.
Zamana bole Casanova
Ab jana hum kya karein?

(Rahul Sathu Feat. Part)

tum kehti kehti thi
pyaar na karenge hum
maine bola tha kho dunga tujhko to dhoondhega tera sanam!

teri galti hui
ese bichhde hum
tune khel ke tode usool
ab na rakhna koi bharam

in hothon mein band baatein teri meri
raaz na kahi khul jaaye!
kisi raste milo tum kabhi ek duje ko dekhke hass jayein.

aur ghuzro tum saamne aage ko badh jao peeche fir mudna nahi
zamana ye padhlega nazron ki baatein humari
main tujhse bas kehna yahi..

(Hook)

Jo kabhi hum na milein,
Na aap shikwa karein.
Zamana bole Casanova
Ab jana hum kya karein?

Shows,Business and Bookings 🍾🌹
📮kingsclanmgmt@gmail.com

#King #Casanova #Gorillabounce

♥️🔥Like,Subscribe and Share to the maximum🔥♥️

snippet.title: 5 Indian Superfoods You Must Eat ft. @Abhi and Niyu
snippet.description:
The Amazing SuperFoods of India that You should start eating regularly. Indian local superfoods that you should make a part of your diet. 5 Superfoods of India. Indian local superfoods.

Buy Kapiva A2 Desi Cow Ghee - http://kapiva.store/FitTuberA2Ghee
(Apply Code FITTUBER15 to get 15% off)
Buy from Amazon - https://amzn.to/3wYM3Hp

Checkout Abhi & Niyu's channel: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCsDTy8jvHcwMvSZf_JGi-FA

A food becomes super when it has plethora of benefits, versatile uses and suits almost all body types. No, I am talking about some rare exotic fruits but are very own local produce which is very easily accessible and are also pocket friendly. Besides weight loss, these foods will provide you skin cleanse, robust digestion and optimum strength naturally. I will also share with you when and how to consume them so that you can derive max out of these superfoods. I make it a point to include these foods in my diet and I firmly believe you should too. The #1 is my all time favourite. 

02:09​ - #5 Superfood of India. The diet of a horse, this Indian superfood is very versatile and is among the most strength giving foods on the planet.
04:02​ - #4 Superfood of India. Among the nuts, this humble superfood has always had a bad rep.But it has some amazing benefits.
05:30​ - #3 Superfood of India. This tree is an excellent pharmacy in itself. Not just the fruit, but its rind, flowers and leaves all find an elaborate mention in Ayurvedic texts for their versatile uses.
06:59​ - #2 Superfood of India. The quintessential summer vegetable, this superfood is light on the stomach and high on nutrition.
08:28​ - Dishonourable Mentions. This section include foods which are not super but marketing makes us believe so. 
08:51​ - #1 Superfood of India. It is my all time favourite. And why not? India’s soil is indeed blessed which is why it is the largest producer of this Superfood in the world.

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 11 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 16th Apr 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 11 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 16th April 21

Your favourite Pakistani dramas are just a click away! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to never miss a video from our amazing YouTube channel that is now available in the USA https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

snippet.title: Major Teaser | Telugu | Adivi Sesh | Sobhita | Saiee Manjrekar | Mahesh Babu | Sashi Tikka
snippet.description:
#Major Telugu Teaser. Major, an Indian film, releasing in Telugu, Hindi and Malayalam is produced by Sony Pictures Films India in association with Mahesh Babu's GMB Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. and A+S Movies. It is directed by acclaimed Telugu director Sashi Kiran Tikka and features Adivi Sesh, Sobhita Dhulipala and Saiee Manjrekar. 

‘The film speaks about the way he lived, not about the way he lost his life.’ 

#MajorTeaser #MajorTheFilm #AdiviSesh #MaheshBabu

Based on the life of real-life Hero Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan, Major, the film, aims to show how this valiant soldier saved the lives of numerous hostages before being martyred by the terrorists who wreaked havoc in the Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai, India on the 26th of November, 2008.

Starring: Adivi Sesh, Saiee Manjrekar, Sobhita Dhulipala, Prakash Raj, Revathi, Murali Sharma
Produced by: Sony Pictures Films India, GMB Entertainment, and A+S Movies
Directed by: Sashi Kiran Tikka
Story and Screenplay: Adivi Sesh 
Script Guidance and Telugu DIalogue: Abburi Ravi 
Cinematography: Vamsi Patchipulusu
Music: Sri Charan Pakala
Editing: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi &  Kodati Pavan Kalyan
Lyrics: Ramajogayya Sastry (Telugu), Ritesh Rajwada (Hindi)
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Action Choreography: Sunil Rodrigues 
Additional Action Choreography: Naba-Subbu
Hindi Dialogue: Akshat Ajay Sharma
Malayalam Dialogue: Yedhu-Abhijith M
Costume Designer : Rekha Boggarapu
Executive Producer: Rajiv Bharadwaj
Direction Team: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi, Narendra Gautam Varma, Dinesh Jajula, Anurag Mudiganti, Balu Manoj D
DI, VFX and Sound Mix: Annapurna Studios
Technical Head: CV Rao
Colorist: Vishnu Vardhan K
VFX Supervisor: Venkateshwar Allagadda
Teaser Mix and Master : S. Anant Srikar
Sound Mix: Krishnaraj Arumugam
Sound Design: Ethi Raaj
P.R.O. : Vamsi-Shekar(Telugu), Sanchita Trivedi(Hindi), Athira Diljith(Malayalam)
Publicity Designs : Anil-Bhanu
Digital Agency: First Show(Telugu), White Rivers Media(Hindi)

Bigg Boss Malayalam Season 3 made its premiere on February 14. With Mohanlal as the host, the 14 contestants include various artists from different fields. The host also revealed that the contestants will go through two-week mandatory quarantine before entering the house. They will be allowed to enter only after they test negative for coronavirus.

The contestants are actor Nobby Marcose, Psychologist Dimple Bhal, RJ Firoz who is also known as 'Kidilam' Firoz, Tv actor Manikuttan, Powerlifting champion and medical student Majiziya Bhanu, DJ Soorya J Meno, Musician A Lekshmi Jayan, Model Sai Vishnu, TV actor Anoop Krishnan, Debater Adoney T John, 'D4' dance winner and youngest contestant Muhammed Ramzan, model and singer Rithu Manthra, Yoga instructor Sandhya Manoj, and dubbing artist Bhagyalakshmi.

snippet.title: Golondaaj (গোলন্দাজ) | Official Teaser | Dev | Ishaa | Dhrubo Banerjee | Releasing Soon | SVF
snippet.description:
যেখান থেকে স্বাধীনতার এক নতুন অধ্যায় শুরু হয় বাংলার প্রথম গোলন্দাজের গল্পে। Watch as sports meet history, led by Nagendra Prasad Sarbadhikari as the collective cries of independence blend with the roar from the first football field of Bengal. 

#Dev #Golondaaj #OfficialTeaser #SVF25

Credits : 

Director : Dhrubo Banerjee
Cinematography : Soumik Haldar (ISC)
Production Design : Shibaji Pal

snippet.title: F9 - Official Trailer 2
snippet.description:
F9
Fast is back June 25.
http://www.thefastsaga.com/

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past. 

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.  

Vin Diesel’s Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he’s going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they’ve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom’s forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad). 

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe—from London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.  

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris “Ludacris” Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar® winner Helen Mirren and Oscar® winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom’s past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.  

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.  www.thefastsaga.com

snippet.title: Hafiz Tahir Qadri | New Ramzan Kalam 2021 | Mujhko Ramzan ka Mahina
snippet.description:
Hafiz Tahir Qadri | New Ramzan Kalam 2021 | Mujhko Ramzan ka Mahina
------------------------------------
Connect with HafizTahirQadri: 👉 http://bit.ly/HafizTahirQadri​
Record Label: *Hafiz Tahir Qadri * 
Credits:-
------------------------------------
Naatkhuwan : Hafiz Tahir Qadri, Hafiz Ahsan Qadri, Hanzal Qadri and Hamza Qadri
Audio: Rao Wassay (RWDS)
Composition :Hafiz Tahir Qadri 
Poet: Allama Nisar Ali Ujagar
DOP: Syed Bilal Sani 
Edit & Post: Taha Qadri
------------------------------------------------



Lyrics
======


Aya ALLAH ka mehman 
Aya he Maah e Ramzan 
Le kar hathon mei Quraan
Aya he maah e ramzan 

Rahmat e Ramzan Rahmat e Ramzan 
Rahmat e Ramzan
Rahmat e Ramzan

Mujhko Ramzaa ka mheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he 

Ramzan k roze rkhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Rahman raazi hoga Rahman raazi hoga
Rahman raazi hoga Rahman raazi hoga

Dekho flak pe chand chamka maah e ramzaa aya 
Nikhra nikhra har ek chehra maah e ramzaa aya

Pure maheenay roze rakhna acha lagta he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Bacho roza rakhna he qurb khuda ka paana he 
Raazi hota he REHMAAN aya he maah e ramzan 

Ramzaa mei momin k muqaddar roshan lagte hein
Masjid k mehraab o mimbar roshan lagte hein

Masjid mei logon ka barhna acha lagta he 

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Ramzan k roze rkhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Ramzan k roze rakhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Rab ki Rahmat ghar ghar utri aya he mehmaan 

mazy mazy ki khushbu pheli Saje hein dastar khuwan

Iftaari mei mil kar khana acha lgta he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka mheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Gunbad e khazra k saye mei ham sab bethe houn
Dastar khuwan saja ho lab par un ki naatain houn 

Taiba mei Iftaari karna Acha lagta he he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Nafraton ko chor k tote dilon ko jour k maah e ramzaa ki barkat se ek banna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Rishwat lena or dena soud pe Business q karna maah e ramzaa ki barkat s bachte rehna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Gheebat or chughal khori neiki se he ghaddari 
Maah e ramzaa ki barkat se sach hi kehna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Ashra e rahmat ashra e bakhshish naar se azaadi 
Maang ujagar apni
bakhshish ban ja faryaadi 

Rab se duaen krte rehna acha lagta he 

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

"Rahmat e ramzaan"
------------------------------------------------
Official Facebook page : https://www.facebook.com/HafizTahirQadri/

Ramzan k roze rakhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Rab ki Rahmat ghar ghar utri aya he mehmaan 

mazy mazy ki khushbu pheli Saje hein dastar khuwan

Iftaari mei mil kar khana acha lgta he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka mheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Gunbad e khazra k saye mei ham sab bethe houn
Dastar khuwan saja ho lab par un ki naatain houn 

Taiba mei Iftaari karna Acha lagta he he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Nafraton ko chor k tote dilon ko jour k maah e ramzaa ki barkat se ek banna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Rishwat lena or dena soud pe Business q karna maah e ramzaa ki barkat s bachte rehna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Gheebat or chughal khori neiki se he ghaddari 
Maah e ramzaa ki barkat se sach hi kehna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Ashra e rahmat ashra e bakhshish naar se azaadi 
Maang ujagar apni
bakhshish ban ja faryaadi 

Rab se duaen krte rehna acha lagta he 

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

"Rahmat e ramzaan"

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3146 - Gokuldham Welcomes Pooja! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

More Useful Links :
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/tmkoc.sabtv
* Follow us on Instagram : http://www.instagram.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmahnfp
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/tmkoc_ntf
* Visit us at : http://www.tmkoc.com

snippet.title: Karnan படத்தில் போலீஸ் அதிகாரியாக நடித்ததற்காக திட்டு வாங்குகிறேன் - Natarajan
snippet.description:
கர்ணன் படத்தில் போலீஸ் அதிகாரியாக நடித்ததற்காக திட்டு வாங்குகிறேன் என நடிகர் நடராஜன் தெரிவித்துள்ளார்.  செய்திகளை துல்லியமாகவும் துரிதமாகவும் வழங்கும் தமிழகத்தின் முதன்மை செய்தி தொலைக்காட்சி உங்கள் நியூஸ் 18 தமிழ்நாடு.

#COVID19 #TNElection2021 #TNPollsOnNews18 #News18TamilnaduLive #TamilNews

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

snippet.title: Durga Chalisa - Anuradha Paudwal | दुर्गा चालीसा | Durga Maa Songs | Durga Chalisa With Lyrics
snippet.description:
Durga Chalisa - Anuradha Paudwal | दुर्गा चालीसा | Durga Maa Songs | Durga Chalisa With Lyrics | Mata Ke Bhajan | Bhakti Song | Durga Bhajan

🔔 आप सभी भक्तों से अनुरोध है कि आप @Nova Spiritual India चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें व भजनो का आनंद ले व अन्य भक्तों के साथ Share करें व Like जरूर करें

Android: http://bit.ly/BhajanBhaktiApp

Popular Videos
🙏🏻 Durga Kavach - https://youtu.be/0rjuR_iiUMg
🙏🏻 Bhor Bhai Din Chad Gaya - https://youtu.be/NtVk69MSdIo
🙏🏻 Jai Ambe Gauri Aarti - https://youtu.be/Kw6J7e8lTDM
🙏🏻 Aigiri Nandini - https://youtu.be/BaAhriclAB0
🙏🏻 Gayatri Mantra - https://youtu.be/Cj-AVigNYYI
🙏🏻 Laxmi Mantra - https://youtu.be/MYX6jw1pb58

Credits:
Singer: Anuradha Paudwal
Music Director: Navin-Manish
Lyrics: Traditional
Edit & Gfx : Prem Graphics PG
Music Label: Music Nova

Lyrics:
Jai Jai Durge Maa
Jai Jai Ambe Maa
Jai Jai Durge Maa
Jai Jai Ambe Maa

Namo Namo Durge Sukh Karni
Namo Namo Ambe Dukh Harni
Nirakar Hai Jyoti Tumhari
Tihun Lok Phaili Ujiyari

Shashi Lalaat Mukh Maha Vishala
Netra Lal Bhrikouti Vikarala
Roop Maatu Ko Adhik Suhave
Darsh Karat Jan Ati Sukh Paave
Tum Sansar Shakti Ley Keena
Palan Hetu Anna Dhan Deena
Annapoorna Hui Jag Paala
Tumhi Aadi Sundari Bala

Pralayakal Sab Nashaan Haari
Tum Gouri Shiv Shankar Pyari
Shiv Yogi Tumhare Gun Gaavein
Brahma Vishnu Tumhein Nit Dhyaave
Roop Saraswati Ko Tum Dhara
De Subuddhi Rishi Munina Ubara
Dhara Roop Narsimha Ko Amba
Pragat Bhayi Phaad Kar Khamba

Raksha Kari Prahlad Bachayo
Hiranyaykush Ko Swarg Pathayo
Lakshmi Roop Dharo Jag Mahin
Shree Narayan Anga Samahin

Ksheer Sindhu Mein Karat Vilaasa
Daya Sindhu Deejey Mann Aasa
Hingalaja Mein Tumhi Bhawani
Mahima Amit Na Jaat Bakhani

Matangi Dhoomawati Mata
Bhuvaneshwari Bagala Sukhdata
Shree Bhairav Tara Jag Tarini
Chhinna Bhala Bhava Dukh Nivarini
Kehari Vahan Sohe Bhawani
Laangur Veer Chalat Agavani
Kar Mein Khappar Khadaga Virajay
Jako Dekh Kaal Darr Bhajey

Sohe Astra Aur Trishula
Jate Uthata Shatru Hiya Shoola

Nagkoti Mein Toumhi Virajat
Tihoun Lok Mein Danka Baajat
Shumbh Nishumbh Daanav Tum Maare
Rakta Beej Shankhana Sanghaare
Mahishasur Nrip Ati Abhimani
Jehi Agh Bhar Mahi Akulaani

Roop Karaal Kali Ka Dhara
Sena Sahita Tum Tihin Samhara
Pidh Pari Santana Par Jab Jab
Bhayi Sahay Maat Tum Tab Tab
Amarpuri Auro Sab Lokaa
Tab Mahima Sab Rahey Ashoka
Jwala Mein Hai Jyoti Tumhari
Tumhein Sada Poojey Nar Nari

Prem Bhakti Se Jo Jas Gaave
Dukh Daridra Nikat Nahin Aave
Dhyave Jo Nar Man Layi
Janma Maran Tako Chhouti Jaayi
Jogi Sur Muni Kahat Pukaari
Yog Nahi Bina Shakti Tumhari
Shankar Acharaj Tap Kinho
Kaamaru Krodh Jeet Sab Leenho

Nishdin Dhyan Dharo Shankar Ko
Kaahu Kaal Nahin Sumiro Tumko
Shakti Roop Ko Maram Na Paayo
Shakti Gayi Tab Mann Pachitayo
Sharnagat Huyi Kiriti Bakhai
Jai Jai Jai Jagadambe Bhawani

Bhayi Prasanna Aadi Jagadamba
Dayi Shakti Nahin Keen Vilamba

Maukon Maatu Kashta Ati Ghero
Tum Bin Kaun Hare Dukh Mero
Asha Trishna Nipat Satave
Ripu Murakh Mohi Ati Darpave
Shatru Nash Keejai Maharani
Soumiron Ikchit Tumhein Bhawani
Karo Kripa Hey Maatu Dayala
Riddhi Siddhi Dey Karahou Nihaala

Jab Lagi Jiyoun Daya Phal Paun
Tumharo Jas Mein Sada Sunaun
Durga Chalisa Jo Koi Gaavey
Sab Sukh Bhog Parampad Paave

Devidas Sharan Neej Jaani
Karahun Krupa Jagadambe Bhawani
Karahun Krupa Jagadambe Bhawani

Sharanagat Raksha Kare
Bhakt Rahe Nishank
Me Aaya Teri Sharan Mein
Matu Leejiye Ank

Join Us

⦿ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nova.spiritual.india

snippet.title: LIVE-CLASS 10TH BOARD EXAMS CANCELLED | HOW YOU WILL GET MARKS? | CBSE Latest News
snippet.description:
Hey!

CBSE has announced class 10th board exams will be cancelled and students will be promoted on the basis of objective criterion. In this pandemic when CBSE students have faced many challenges. First, they study online and couldn't get proper support from schools, then their exam gets postponed. But students were so much hardworking that they didn't stop and keep learning and prepared for their exams. But now due to the rise in corona cases, CBSE Board has decided to cancel CBSE class 10th exams this year. 

Comment below on what you feel about it. 

Team Dear Sir

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 169 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Mayura organises a charity fashion show and donates money to the women who are also victims of male chauvinists. Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: Tapu Sena ने कर दिया कपड़ो का त्याग | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | Mini Episodes | Webisodes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the mini-episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7YXlq18P_6laPNbm0MuqEuG

About The Show:
----------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.description:
Dekhiye Mini ki kahaani mein naye twists aur jaaniye who the real Stranger is! 

#HelloMini3, releasing on 23 April.

#MXOriginalSeries #MXPlayer #HelloMini

Directed by Arjun Srivasstava

Key Cast: Anuja Joshi, Mrinal Dutt, Darshana Banik, Anshul Pandey, Abhinav Sharma, Summer Jacobs, Vibhav Roy, Nirisha Basnett, Suchitra Pillai, Vikrant Koul and Tanvi Shinde

About Hello Mini 3: 
Rivanah’s life goes back to normalcy when she and Danny get back together and she starts working at Space Age Technologies. Rivanah’s memories about Hiya Chowdhary start resurfacing and it leaves her parents in a fix.

Tista’s sudden death pushes her to uncover the truth about a cult group which honey traps politicians for its ulterior motives. As Virat plots and schemes against Rivanah to avenge Vixy’s loss, will Rivanah finally close in on finding out who the Stranger is?

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 07 | 17th April, 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 07: Champaklal Gada Gets A Grand Welcome In Gokuldham Society
------------------------------------
It is time for celebrations as Champaklal Gada is coming back to Gokuldham society. Tapu welcomes him with excessive zeal and society members greet him with utmost pleasure. But how does everybody come together when a problem strikes? Find out in this episode. 
 
 
About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

snippet.title: Coronavirus: Uttar Pradesh में Lockdown लगाने के सवाल पर क्या बोलें CM Yogi Adityanath?
snippet.description:
Coronavirus Lockdown: CM Yogi Adityanath ने कहा कि आज लॉकडाउन की कोई जरूरत नहीं है. सीएम योगी ने कहा कि जहां पांच सौ से ज्यादा मामले हैं या जहां सौ से ज्यादा रोजोना केस आ रहे हैं वहां आप नाइट कर्फ्यू लगाया जाए. हमने पहले दिन से ऐसी व्यवस्था बना दी है. इस दौरान जरूरी चीजों की सप्लाई जारी रहे. हमने बेसिक और माध्यमिक शिक्षा परिषद के स्कूल और कॉलेजों को 20 अप्रैल तक के लिए बंद कर दिया है. क्लब और कोचिंग को बंद करने के लिए हमने आज कहा है. उन्होंने कहा कि बंद सभागार में पचास से ज्यादा लोग और ओपन में 100 से ज्यादा लोग एकत्रित ना हों. शर्त ये है कि सभी के पास मास्क होना चाहिए. जो सर्विस से जुड़े लोग हैं उनके पास सेनेटाइजर और ग्लव्स होना चाहिए.

#AajTakHD #HindiNews #AajTak #aajtaklivetv #aajtakhindi 
#today_breaking_news #aajtak

आज तक भारत का सर्वश्रेष्ठ हिंदी न्‍यूज चैनल है । आज तक न्‍यूज चैनल राजनीति, मनोरंजन, बॉलीवुड, व्यापार और खेल में नवीनतम समाचारों को शामिल करता है। आज तक न्‍यूज चैनल की लाइव खबरें एवं ब्रेकिंग न्यूज के लिए बने रहें ।

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack Snyder’s Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero who’s now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), it’s with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thing’s for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweighöfer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Raúl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix 
https://youtube.com/Netflix

After a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries takes the ultimate gamble by venturing into the quarantine zone for the greatest heist ever.

snippet.title: Shola | AKASA ft. Charan | Rohit Saraf | Party Hit Song 2021
snippet.description:

snippet.title: ராஜ விருந்து - 76 Items in One Leaf for ₹700 at Raja Bhogam | Irfan's View
snippet.description:
#RajaBhogam #UnlimitedFeast #irfansview 

Raja Bhogam is a restaurant which was known as Carnival, they have changed their name to most famous feast of them. Now they give 76 items in a huge banana leaf for rupees 700, all the items which is served is unlimited. They serve varieties of items in Veg and Non-Veg too. From starters to dessert they are just giving varieties. The taste of each dish was really amazing. It was really a king feast, and I really enjoyed the feast.

LOCATION: https://g.page/rajabhogam?share
 
TIMELINE:
0:00- Intro
3:59- Introducing Raj Bhogam
6:14- Chicken Pepper Soup
6:55- Potato 65
7:23- Banana Flower Kola
7:53- Kuluki Sarbath
8:01- Pepper Paneer
8:27- Egg 65
8:46- Chicken Malai Tikka
9:02- Vadagam
9:21- Mutton Sheek
9:40- Paneer and Pine Apple Tikka
9:59- Egg Omlette
10:05- Grape Kulukki Sarbath
10:17- Nethili Fry
10:48- Parotta with Mutton Curry
11:22- Chops
11:36- Chicken 65
11:52- Chicken curry with Garlic spicy parotta
12:44- Ghee parotta with podimas
13:12- Fish fry
13:32- Thalassery Biriyani
13:55- Lollipop
14:08- Prawn
14:20- Mint Kulukki
14:28- Veg Korma
15:14- Mutton Meet Balls
15:39- Vatha Kuzhambu
16:17- Chicken Biriyani 
16:34- Mutton Biriyani
17:08- Nannari
17:15- Buttermilk
17:39- Desserts
18:13- Bread halwa
18:25- Beetroot halwa with Paan Ice cream
18:43- Mukkani Halwa
19:00- Kawni rice with vanilla ice cream
19:08- Berry Berry paayasam with strawberry Ice cream 
19:33- Firni
20:23- Closure

snippet.title: क्या हुई Popatlal कि शादी Fix? -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता-Ep 3145 -15th April, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/dplnk?schema=sony://asset/1000114936#utm_source=YOUTUBE&utm_medium=slate&utm_campaign=YT_traffic
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Episode 3145: Is Popatlal's Wedding Fixed?
---------------------------------------------------------
Tapu Sena is extremely happy and inform everyone that Popatlal's marriage is finally fixed and that Pooja is going to come to Gokuldham society later to meet everyone. Iyer informs that men of the society about Popatal's marriage and that news makes everyone happy. Popatlal arrives in the society inside an auto and proceeds to chat with Tapu Sena and Abdul. Watch the full episode now.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.
